system.name: Neo Design System Component Kit
system.description: AI-optimized Vue 3 component library with comprehensive TypeScript interfaces

components.name: nck-button
components.description: Interface for nck-button component props Interactive button component with icons, loading states, and accessibility built-in
components.usage: Primary component for user actions - automatically handles accessibility, focus, and loading states

examples.name: primary
examples.code: <nck-button label="Save Changes" type="filled" />
examples.context: Form submissions, primary actions, confirmations

examples.name: secondary
examples.code: <nck-button label="Cancel" type="outline" color="secondary" />
examples.context: Cancel buttons, back navigation, alternative paths

examples.name: withLeftIcon
examples.code: <nck-button label="Add Item" type="filled" leftIcon="add-plus" />
examples.context: Actions where icon adds clarity (save, add, edit, delete)

examples.name: withRightIcon
examples.code: <nck-button label="Continue" type="filled" rightIcon="arrow-right" />
examples.context: Navigation, external links, dropdown triggers

examples.name: loading
examples.code: <nck-button label="Saving..." :loading="true" loadingText="Saving your changes" />
examples.context: Form submissions, API calls, any async action

examples.name: disabled
examples.code: <nck-button label="Submit" :disabled="!isFormValid" />
examples.context: Form validation, conditional actions, locked states

examples.name: danger
examples.code: <nck-button label="Delete Item" type="filled" color="danger" leftIcon="delete" />
examples.context: Delete operations, irreversible actions

examples.name: compact
examples.code: <nck-button label="Edit" type="outline" size="s" leftIcon="edit" />
examples.context: Table actions, toolbars, dense layouts

examples.name: prominent
examples.code: <nck-button label="Get Started" type="filled" size="l" />
examples.context: Hero sections, call-to-action, primary flows

examples.name: formSubmit
examples.code: <nck-button label="Submit" type="filled" nativeType="submit" />
examples.context: Inside nck-form components, native form submissions

examples.name: subtle
examples.code: <nck-button label="Learn More" type="ghost" rightIcon="arrow-right" />
examples.context: Help links, optional actions, subtle interactions

props.name: filled
props.type:
Primary actions (save, submit, confirm) - solid background
   * - outline: Secondary actions (cancel, back) - border only
   * - ghost: Tertiary actions (help, learn more) - text only
   * @default "filled"
   * @aiSuggestions { "primary": "filled", "secondary": "outline", "tertiary": "ghost" }
   */
  type?: ButtonType
props.description:
Interface for nck-button component props
 * Interactive button component with icons, loading states, and accessibility built-in
 *
 * @aiUsage Primary component for user actions - automatically handles accessibility, focus, and loading states
 * @aiCategory action
 * @aiComplexity simple
 */
export interface INckButton {
  /**
   * Button display text - the main label users will see
   * If empty, you must provide iconAltText for accessibility
   *

props.name: Note
props.type:
Ghost type becomes Outline when floating
   * @default false
   * @aiUsage Use for primary floating actions in mobile interfaces
   */
  floating?: boolean
props.description:
Button size variant - affects padding, text size, and icon size
   * - s: Small buttons for compact interfaces (desktop only)
   * - m: Medium buttons for standard use (most common)
   * - l: Large buttons for prominent actions
   * @default "m"
   */
  size?: ButtonSize;

  /**
   * Button color theme - semantic meaning through color
   * - light: Default light theme (most common)
   * - primary: Main brand actions
   * - positive: Success/confirmation actions (green)
   * - negative: Destructive actions (red)
   * @default "light"
   * @aiSuggestions { "save": "primary", "delete": "negative", "cancel": "light", "confirm": "positive" }
   */
  color?: ButtonColor;

  /**
   * ARIA role override - changes semantic meaning
   * - button: Interactive button element (default)
   * - link: Navigation link behavior
   * @default "button"
   * @aiUsage Use "link" for navigation actions, "button" for form actions
   */
  ariaRole?: "button" | "link";

  /**
   * Native button type - only applies when ariaRole is "button"
   * Controls form submission behavior
   * @default ButtonControlType.BUTTON
   * @aiUsage Use SUBMIT for form submission buttons
   */
  controlType?: ButtonControlType;

  /**
   * Icon name from neo-icon-kit displayed on the left side
   * Use semantic icons that reinforce the action meaning
   *

props.name: primary
props.type:
`<nck-button label="Save Changes" type="filled" />`,

  /**
   * Secondary action button - for alternative actions
   * @aiContext Cancel buttons, back navigation, alternative paths
   */
  secondary: `<nck-button label="Cancel" type="outline" color="secondary" />`,

  /**
   * Button with left icon - reinforces action meaning
   * @aiContext Actions where icon adds clarity (save, add, edit, delete)
   */
  withLeftIcon: `<nck-button label="Add Item" type="filled" leftIcon="add-plus" />`,

  /**
   * Button with right icon - for directional or external actions
   * @aiContext Navigation, external links, dropdown triggers
   */
  withRightIcon: `<nck-button label="Continue" type="filled" rightIcon="arrow-right" />`,

  /**
   * Loading button - for async operations
   * @aiContext Form submissions, API calls, any async action
   */
  loading: `<nck-button label="Saving..." :loading="true" loadingText="Saving your changes" />`,

  /**
   * Disabled button - for unavailable actions
   * @aiContext Form validation, conditional actions, locked states
   */
  disabled: `<nck-button label="Submit" :disabled="!isFormValid" />`,

  /**
   * Destructive action button - for dangerous operations
   * @aiContext Delete operations, irreversible actions
   */
  danger: `<nck-button label="Delete Item" type="filled" color="danger" leftIcon="delete" />`,

  /**
   * Small button - for compact interfaces
   * @aiContext Table actions, toolbars, dense layouts
   */
  compact: `<nck-button label="Edit" type="outline" size="s" leftIcon="edit" />`,

  /**
   * Large prominent button - for important actions
   * @aiContext Hero sections, call-to-action, primary flows
   */
  prominent: `<nck-button label="Get Started" type="filled" size="l" />`,

  /**
   * Form submission button - proper type for forms
   * @aiContext Inside nck-form components, native form submissions
   */
  formSubmit: `<nck-button label="Submit" type="filled" nativeType="submit" />`,

  /**
   * Ghost button - minimal styling for tertiary actions
   * @aiContext Help links, optional actions, subtle interactions
   */
  subtle: `<nck-button label="Learn More" type="ghost" rightIcon="arrow-right" />`
} as const
props.description:
Display counter badge with this number
   * Shows 99+ for numbers > 99, must be integer >= 0
   * Badge appears after label or top-right of right icon
   * @aiUsage Use for notification counts, item counts
   */
  counterBadgeEntry?: number;

  /**
   * Adds "+" prefix to counter badge number
   * @default false
   * @aiUsage Use when counter represents additions or growth
   */
  counterBadgePlusPrefix?: boolean;

  /**
   * HTML form attribute - associates button with specific form by ID
   * Only applies when ariaRole is "button"
   * Useful for buttons outside the form element
   *

antiPatterns.multiPrimary: Don't use multiple filled buttons in the same section
antiPatterns.genericLabels: Avoid labels like 'Click here', 'Button', 'OK' - be specific
antiPatterns.missingLoading: Always show loading states for async operations
antiPatterns.wrongColors: Don't use danger color for non-destructive actions
antiPatterns.tooManyIcons: Limit to one icon per button, prefer left side for actions

components.name: nck-table
components.description: Interface for nck-table component props Comprehensive data table component with sorting, selection, accessibility, and responsive features
components.usage: Primary component for displaying structured data with sorting, filtering, and selection capabilities

examples.name: basic
examples.code:
<nck-table
    :columnsDescription="columns"
    :data="tableData"
    rowUniqueKey="id"
    ariaLabel="Users table">
  </nck-table>
examples.context: Product lists, user directories, simple data display

examples.name: sortableClickable
examples.code:
<nck-table
    :columnsDescription="sortableColumns"
    :data="users"
    rowUniqueKey="userId"
    rowAriaRole="button"
    ariaLabel="User management table"
    @row-clicked="handleRowClick">
  </nck-table>
examples.context: Interactive data management, detailed views

examples.name: multiSelect
examples.code:
<nck-table
    :columnsDescription="columns"
    :data="products"
    rowUniqueKey="productId"
    :multiSelect="true"
    selectAllLabel="Select all products"
    unselectAllLabel="Deselect all products"
    :getLabelForRowSelection="(product, selected) =>
      \
examples.context: Data management, bulk actions, selection workflows

examples.name: responsive
examples.code:
<nck-table
    :columnsDescription="wideColumns"
    :data="detailedData"
    rowUniqueKey="id"
    :scrollableContent="true"
    ariaLabel="Detailed data table">
  </nck-table>
examples.context: Mobile interfaces, wide data tables

examples.name: withSlots
examples.code:
<nck-table
    :columnsDescription="columnsWithSlots"
    :data="orders"
    rowUniqueKey="orderId"
    ariaLabel="Order management table">

    <template #status="{ entry }">
      <nck-badge
        :label="entry.status"
        :type="getStatusBadgeType(entry.status)" />
    </template>

    <template #actions="{ entry }">
      <nck-button
        label="View"
        type="outline"
        size="s"
        @click="viewOrder(entry)" />
      <nck-button
        label="Edit"
        type="outline"
        size="s"
        @click="editOrder(entry)" />
    </template>
  </nck-table>
examples.context: Rich content display, action columns, custom formatting

examples.name: initiallySorted
examples.code:
<nck-table
    :columnsDescription="sortableColumns"
    :data="sortedData"
    rowUniqueKey="id"
    :initiallySortedColumnIndex="1"
    :initiallySortedColumnSortOrder="SortOrder.DESCENDING"
    ariaLabel="Pre-sorted data table">
  </nck-table>
examples.context: Default sorted views, pre-configured data display

props.name: headerLabel
props.type:
"Name", dataPath: "user.name", width: "30%" }]
   * @aiRequired true - Must have at least one column
   */
  columnsDescription: ITableColumnOptions[]
props.description:
Interface for nck-table component props
 * Comprehensive data table component with sorting, selection, accessibility, and responsive features
 *
 * @aiUsage Primary component for displaying structured data with sorting, filtering, and selection capabilities
 * @aiCategory data-display
 * @aiComplexity complex
 */
export interface INckTable {
  /**
   * Column configuration array - defines table structure and behavior
   * Each column object contains: headerLabel, dataPath/slotName, width, alignment, sorting
   *

props.name: id
props.type:
1, name: "John", email: "john@example.com" }]
   * @aiRequired true - Table data source
   */
  data: Array<Record<string, any>>
props.description:
Array of data objects to display in table rows
   * Each object represents one row of data
   *

props.name: rowUniqueKey
props.description:
Property key used for unique row identification (for v-key performance)
   * Must be unique across all data entries
   *

props.name: button
props.type:
Row performs an action when clicked
   * - link: Row navigates to another page/section
   * @aiRequired When row-clicked event listener is provided
   * @aiSuggestions { "action": "button", "navigation": "link", "details": "button" }
   */
  rowAriaRole?: "button" | "link"
props.description:
Accessible label for the table - describes table purpose
   * Required if labeledByTitleId is not provided
   *

props.name: entry
props.description:
Enables row selection with checkboxes
   * When true, adds selection column and enables multi-selection functionality
   * @default false
   * @aiUsage Use for bulk operations, data management interfaces
   */
  multiSelect?: boolean;

  /**
   * Accessible label for header "select all" checkbox when unchecked
   * Required when multiSelect is enabled
   *

props.name: entry
props.description:
Determines which rows cannot be selected in multiSelect mode
   * Can be property name (string) or function returning boolean
   *

props.name: basic
props.type: ` `, /** * Sortable table with click handling * @aiContext Interactive data management, detailed views */ sortableClickable: ` `, /** * Multi-select table for bulk operations * @aiContext Data management, bulk actions, selection workflows */ multiSelect: ` `, /** * Responsive scrollable table * @aiContext Mobile interfaces, wide data tables */ responsive: ` `, /** * Table with custom column slots * @aiContext Rich content display, action columns, custom formatting */ withSlots: ` `, /** * Initially sorted table * @aiContext Default sorted views, pre-configured data display */ initiallySorted: ` ` } as const
props.description:
Enables horizontal scrolling for table content
   * Useful for tables with many columns or responsive layouts
   * @default false
   * @aiUsage Use for wide tables or mobile-responsive designs
   */
  scrollableContent?: boolean;

  /**
   * Column index to show as initially sorted (0-based)
   * Must correspond to a sortable column (has onSort function)
   *

antiPatterns.missingRowKey: Don't forget rowUniqueKey - causes performance issues and selection bugs
antiPatterns.asyncSortingWithoutHandling: Don't use onSort without proper loading states
antiPatterns.missingAccessibilityLabels: Don't enable multiSelect without proper label functions
antiPatterns.overuseSlots: Don't use slots for simple text content - use dataPath instead
antiPatterns.widthOverallocation: Don't set column widths that total > 100%

components.name: nck-banner
components.description: Interface for nck-banner component props Alert and notification component for displaying contextual system messages
components.usage: Primary component for user notifications - handles semantic messaging with icons and dismissal

examples.name: success
examples.code:
<nck-banner
    type="success"
    heading="Changes saved successfully"
    :dismissable="true"
    @banner-dismissed="handleDismiss" />
examples.context: Form submissions, save operations, successful processes

examples.name: error
examples.code:
<nck-banner
    type="critical"
    heading="Unable to save changes"
    linkLabel="Try again"
    linkAriaRole="button"
    @link-clicked="retryAction" />
examples.context: Form validation errors, API failures, system issues

examples.name: warning
examples.code:
<nck-banner
    type="warning"
    heading="Your session will expire in 5 minutes"
    linkLabel="Extend session"
    linkAriaRole="button"
    @link-clicked="extendSession" />
examples.context: Data validation, important notices, attention needed

examples.name: information
examples.code:
<nck-banner
    type="info"
    heading="New features are now available"
    linkLabel="Learn more"
    linkAriaRole="link"
    :dismissable="true"
    @link-clicked="navigateToFeatures" />
examples.context: Tips, help text, feature announcements

examples.name: customIcon
examples.code:
<nck-banner
    type="success"
    heading="Your coffee is ready"
    leadingIcon="breakfast"
    leadingIconAltText="Coffee cup"
    :dismissable="true" />
examples.context: Domain-specific notifications, custom workflows

examples.name: fullWidth
examples.code:
<nck-banner
    type="warning"
    heading="Scheduled maintenance tonight from 2-4 AM EST"
    :noRadius="true"
    linkLabel="View details"
    linkAriaRole="link"
    @link-clicked="viewMaintenanceInfo" />
examples.context: System-wide messages, maintenance notices

examples.name: withItems
examples.code:
<nck-banner
    type="critical"
    heading="Please fix the following issues:">

    <nck-banner-item-group>
      <nck-banner-item text="Email address is required" />
      <nck-banner-item
        text="Password must be at least 8 characters"
        linkLabel="View requirements"
        linkAriaRole="link"
        @link-clicked="showPasswordHelp" />
      <nck-banner-item text="Terms of service must be accepted" />
    </nck-banner-item-group>
  </nck-banner>
examples.context: Multi-point messages, validation feedback lists

examples.name: persistent
examples.code:
<nck-banner
    type="critical"
    heading="System is in read-only mode"
    linkLabel="Check status"
    linkAriaRole="link"
    @link-clicked="checkSystemStatus" />
examples.context: Critical system status, mandatory notices

props.name: heading
props.description:
Interface for nck-banner component props
 * Alert and notification component for displaying contextual system messages
 *
 * @aiUsage Primary component for user notifications - handles semantic messaging with icons and dismissal
 * @aiCategory feedback
 * @aiComplexity medium
 */
export interface INckBanner {
  /**
   * Banner display text - the main message users will see
   * Plain text only, no HTML allowed for security and consistency
   *

props.name: button
props.type:
Link performs an action (like opening modal, triggering process)
   * - link: Link navigates to another page or section
   * @aiRequired When linkLabel is provided
   * @aiSuggestions { "action": "button", "navigation": "link", "modal": "button" }
   */
  linkAriaRole?: "button" | "link"
props.description:
Banner semantic type - controls appearance and meaning
   * - NEUTRAL: Default informational messages (gray theme)
   * - INFORMATION: General information and tips (blue theme)
   * - SUCCESS: Positive confirmations and completions (green theme)
   * - WARNING: Caution messages and attention needed (orange theme)
   * - ERROR: Critical errors and failures (red theme)
   * @default BannerType.NEUTRAL
   * @aiSuggestions {
   *   "success": "SUCCESS",
   *   "error": "ERROR",
   *   "warning": "WARNING",
   *   "info": "INFORMATION",
   *   "default": "NEUTRAL"
   * }
   */
  type?: BannerType;

  /**
   * Enables dismissal functionality with close button
   * When true, shows an X button that allows users to hide the banner
   * @default false
   * @aiUsage Enable for non-critical messages that users can dismiss
   */
  dismissable?: boolean;

  /**
   * Removes rounded corners for edge-to-edge styling
   * Use when banner spans full container width without margins
   * @default false
   * @aiUsage Enable for full-width page notifications or card-edge styling
   */
  noRadius?: boolean;

  /**
   * Clickable link text displayed after the heading
   * Must be used with linkAriaRole and link-clicked event handler
   *

props.name: success
props.type:
`<nck-banner
    type="success"
    heading="Changes saved successfully"
    :dismissable="true"
    @banner-dismissed="handleDismiss" />`,

  /**
   * Error notification - critical alerts
   * @aiContext Form validation errors, API failures, system issues
   */
  error: `<nck-banner
    type="critical"
    heading="Unable to save changes"
    linkLabel="Try again"
    linkAriaRole="button"
    @link-clicked="retryAction" />`,

  /**
   * Warning notification - cautionary messages
   * @aiContext Data validation, important notices, attention needed
   */
  warning: `<nck-banner
    type="warning"
    heading="Your session will expire in 5 minutes"
    linkLabel="Extend session"
    linkAriaRole="button"
    @link-clicked="extendSession" />`,

  /**
   * Information banner - general guidance
   * @aiContext Tips, help text, feature announcements
   */
  information: `<nck-banner
    type="info"
    heading="New features are now available"
    linkLabel="Learn more"
    linkAriaRole="link"
    :dismissable="true"
    @link-clicked="navigateToFeatures" />`,

  /**
   * Custom icon banner - specific context messaging
   * @aiContext Domain-specific notifications, custom workflows
   */
  customIcon: `<nck-banner
    type="success"
    heading="Your coffee is ready"
    leadingIcon="breakfast"
    leadingIconAltText="Coffee cup"
    :dismissable="true" />`,

  /**
   * Full-width banner - page-level notifications
   * @aiContext System-wide messages, maintenance notices
   */
  fullWidth: `<nck-banner
    type="warning"
    heading="Scheduled maintenance tonight from 2-4 AM EST"
    :noRadius="true"
    linkLabel="View details"
    linkAriaRole="link"
    @link-clicked="viewMaintenanceInfo" />`,

  /**
   * Banner with detailed content using item groups
   * @aiContext Multi-point messages, validation feedback lists
   */
  withItems: `<nck-banner
    type="critical"
    heading="Please fix the following issues:">

    <nck-banner-item-group>
      <nck-banner-item text="Email address is required" />
      <nck-banner-item
        text="Password must be at least 8 characters"
        linkLabel="View requirements"
        linkAriaRole="link"
        @link-clicked="showPasswordHelp" />
      <nck-banner-item text="Terms of service must be accepted" />
    </nck-banner-item-group>
  </nck-banner>`,

  /**
   * Persistent system banner - non-dismissable critical info
   * @aiContext Critical system status, mandatory notices
   */
  persistent: `<nck-banner
    type="critical"
    heading="System is in read-only mode"
    linkLabel="Check status"
    linkAriaRole="link"
    @link-clicked="checkSystemStatus" />`
} as const
props.description:
Custom icon name from neo-icon-kit to override default type icon
   * Replaces semantic type icon with specific icon for context
   *

antiPatterns.overuse: Don't show multiple banners simultaneously - prioritize and stack appropriately
antiPatterns.wrongType: Don't use success type for neutral information or error type for warnings
antiPatterns.missingActions: Don't provide linkLabel without corresponding event handler
antiPatterns.poorContent: Avoid vague messages like 'Error occurred' - be specific about the issue
antiPatterns.accessibilityGaps: Don't forget linkAriaRole when providing linkLabel

components.name: nck-checkbox
components.description: Interface for nck-checkbox component props Checkbox input component with validation, accessibility, and form integration
components.usage: Essential component for boolean selections, agreement confirmations, and multi-option forms

examples.name: basic
examples.code:
<nck-checkbox
    label="Enable email notifications"
    name="emailNotifications"
    v-model="userSettings.emailNotifications" />
examples.context: User preferences, feature toggles, simple confirmations

examples.name: required
examples.code:
<nck-checkbox
    label="I agree to the Terms of Service"
    name="termsAccepted"
    v-model="formData.termsAccepted"
    rules="required"
    required />
examples.context: Terms acceptance, required confirmations, agreements

examples.name: withDescription
examples.code:
<nck-checkbox
    label="Share usage data"
    name="shareUsageData"
    v-model="privacySettings.shareUsageData"
    description="Help us improve our service by sharing anonymous usage statistics"
    icon="info"
    iconAltText="Information icon" />
examples.context: Complex settings, impactful decisions, detailed options

examples.name: indeterminate
examples.code:
<nck-checkbox
    label="Select all items"
    name="selectAll"
    v-model="selectAllState"
    :indeterminate="someItemsSelected && !allItemsSelected"
    @change="handleSelectAll" />
examples.context: "Select all" functionality, parent-child relationships

examples.name: emphasized
examples.code:
<nck-checkbox
    label="I understand this action cannot be undone"
    name="confirmDeletion"
    v-model="confirmationState.understood"
    emphasis="emphasized"
    rules="required"
    icon="warning"
    iconAltText="Warning icon"
    required />
examples.context: Important agreements, destructive confirmations

examples.name: disabled
examples.code:
<nck-checkbox
    label="Administrator privileges"
    name="isAdmin"
    v-model="user.isAdmin"
    :disabled="!canModifyPermissions"
    description="Contact your system administrator to change this setting" />
examples.context: System settings, computed values, conditional states

examples.name: customValues
examples.code:
<nck-checkbox
    label="Project status"
    name="projectStatus"
    v-model="project.status"
    :checkedValue="'active'"
    :uncheckedValue="'inactive'"
    description="Toggle between active and inactive project status" />
examples.context: Status toggles, non-boolean selections

props.name: label
props.description:
Interface for nck-checkbox component props
 * Checkbox input component with validation, accessibility, and form integration
 *
 * @aiUsage Essential component for boolean selections, agreement confirmations, and multi-option forms
 * @aiCategory form
 * @aiComplexity simple
 */
export interface INckCheckboxProps {
  /**
   * Accessible label text for the checkbox
   * Required for screen reader accessibility and user understanding
   *

props.name: name
props.description:
Unique field name for form identification and validation
   * Used by form libraries like VeeValidate for field tracking
   *

props.name: focus
props.description:
Current checkbox state (checked/unchecked)
   * Use with v-model for two-way data binding
   *

antiPatterns.unclearLabels: Avoid vague labels like 'Accept' without clear context
antiPatterns.tooManyRequired: Don't make every checkbox required - be selective
antiPatterns.noDescription: Don't omit descriptions for complex or impactful choices
antiPatterns.poorGrouping: Don't scatter related checkboxes throughout the form
antiPatterns.wrongControl: Don't use checkboxes for mutually exclusive options (use radio buttons instead)

components.name: nck-dropdown
components.description: Interface for nck-dropdown component props Dropdown selection component with search, validation, and accessibility features
components.usage: Essential component for option selection, navigation, and form inputs

examples.name: basic
examples.code:
<nck-dropdown
    label="Status"
    name="status"
    v-model="formData.status"
    :options="[
      { value: 'active', label: 'Active' },
      { value: 'inactive', label: 'Inactive' },
      { value: 'pending', label: 'Pending' }
    ]"
    placeholder="Select status"
    required />
examples.context: Status selection, category picker, simple choices

examples.name: searchable
examples.code:
<nck-dropdown
    label="Country"
    name="country"
    v-model="userData.country"
    :options="countryOptions"
    placeholder="Search and select country"
    :searchable="true"
    leadingIcon="location"
    leadingIconAltText="Location icon"
    required />
examples.context: Country selection, user lists, large datasets

examples.name: multiple
examples.code:
<nck-dropdown
    label="Skills"
    name="skills"
    v-model="userProfile.skills"
    :options="skillsOptions"
    placeholder="Select your skills"
    :multiple="true"
    :maxSelections="5"
    :clearable="true"
    emptyMessage="No skills available" />
examples.context: Skills selection, permissions, tag assignment

examples.name: grouped
examples.code:
<nck-dropdown
    label="Department"
    name="department"
    v-model="employee.department"
    :options="[
      { value: 'eng-frontend', label: 'Frontend', group: 'Engineering' },
      { value: 'eng-backend', label: 'Backend', group: 'Engineering' },
      { value: 'design-ui', label: 'UI Design', group: 'Design' },
      { value: 'design-ux', label: 'UX Research', group: 'Design' }
    ]"
    :groupByCategory="true"
    placeholder="Select department"
    required />

props.name: label
props.description:
Interface for nck-dropdown component props
 * Dropdown selection component with search, validation, and accessibility features
 *
 * @aiUsage Essential component for option selection, navigation, and form inputs
 * @aiCategory form
 * @aiComplexity medium
 */
export interface INckDropdownProps {
  /**
   * Accessible label text for the dropdown field
   * Required for screen reader accessibility and field identification
   *

props.name: name
props.description:
Unique field name for form identification and validation
   * Used by form libraries like VeeValidate for field tracking
   *

props.name: value
props.type:
'us', label: 'United States' }, { value: 'ca', label: 'Canada' }]
   * @aiRequired true
   * @aiUsage Ensure labels are user-friendly and values are system-appropriate
   */
  options: Array<{
    value: string | number
props.description:
Array of selectable options for the dropdown
   * Each option should have value and label properties
   *

props.name: in
props.description:
Currently selected option value
   * Use with v-model for two-way data binding
   *

props.name: focus
props.description:
Whether the field is required for form submission
   * Adds visual indicators and affects validation behavior
   * @default false
   * @aiUsage Set true for essential selection fields
   */
  required?: boolean;

  /**
   * Whether the dropdown is disabled and non-interactive
   * Prevents user interaction and excludes from form submission
   * @default false
   * @aiUsage Use for conditional logic or read-only states
   */
  disabled?: boolean;

  /**
   * Enables search/filter functionality within dropdown options
   * Allows users to quickly find options by typing
   * @default false
   * @aiUsage Enable for dropdowns with many options (10+)
   */
  searchable?: boolean;

  /**
   * Enables selection of multiple options
   * Changes behavior to checkbox-style multi-select
   * @default false
   * @aiUsage Use when users need to select multiple related items
   */
  multiple?: boolean;

  /**
   * Maximum number of selections allowed (when multiple=true)
   * Prevents over-selection and provides user guidance
   *

antiPatterns.tooManyOptions: Avoid dropdowns with 50+ unfiltered options - use search or different UI
antiPatterns.unclearLabels: Don't use technical values as user-facing labels
antiPatterns.noEmptyState: Always handle and communicate empty option states
antiPatterns.forcedSelection: Don't force selection of first option - let users choose
antiPatterns.inconsistentOptionStructure: Maintain consistent option object structure across all dropdowns

antiPatterns.placeholderLabels: Never use placeholder text as the only field labeling

props.name: STANDARD
props.type:
Full spacing for standalone headers (default)
   * - CONDENSED: Reduced spacing when followed by tabs or filters
   * @default HeaderType.STANDARD
   * @aiSuggestions { "standalone": "STANDARD", "with-tabs": "CONDENSED", "with-filters": "CONDENSED" }
   */
  headerType?: HeaderType
props.description:
Interface for nck-header component props
 * Page header component for navigation, branding, and primary page actions
 *
 * @aiUsage Essential component for page structure - provides consistent navigation and page context
 * @aiCategory layout
 * @aiComplexity medium
 */
export interface INckHeader {
  /**
   * Main page or section title displayed prominently
   * Cannot be used with title-content slot
   *

props.name: button
props.type:
Icon performs an action (menu, close, action)
   * - link: Icon navigates to another page/section
   * @aiRequired When leftIconName is used
   * @aiSuggestions { "menu": "button", "navigation": "link", "action": "button", "back": "link" }
   */
  leftIconAriaRole?: "button" | "link"
props.description:
Subtitle layout positioning (desktop only)
   * - under: Subtitle appears on line below title (default)
   * - inline: Subtitle appears same line as title with spacing
   * @default "under"
   * @aiSuggestions { "long-subtitle": "under", "short-subtitle": "inline", "clean-layout": "under" }
   */
  subtitlePosition?: "under" | "inline";

  /**
   * Shows bottom border divider below header
   * Provides visual separation from content below
   * @default true
   * @aiUsage Disable when header flows into related content (tabs, filters)
   */
  showDivider?: boolean;

  /**
   * Breadcrumb-style back navigation link
   * Shows as text link on desktop, left arrow icon on mobile
   * Cannot be used with leftIconName properties (mutually exclusive)
   *

props.name: button
props.type:
Icon performs an action (menu, search, modal)
   * - link: Icon navigates to another page/section
   * @aiRequired When rightIconName is used
   * @aiSuggestions { "menu": "button", "search": "button", "settings": "link", "modal": "button" }
   */
  rightIconAriaRole?: "button" | "link"
props.description:
Custom right-side icon name from neo-icon-kit
   * Cannot be used with rightButtonLabel properties (mutually exclusive)
   *

props.name: button
props.type:
Button performs an action (save, add, process)
   * - link: Button navigates to another page/section
   * @aiRequired When rightButtonLabel is used
   * @aiSuggestions { "save": "button", "add": "button", "settings": "link", "help": "link" }
   */
  rightButtonAriaRole?: "button" | "link"
props.description:
Text for right-side button (desktop) that becomes icon on mobile
   * Cannot be used with rightIconName properties (mutually exclusive)
   *

antiPatterns.mutuallyExclusive: Don't use backlink with leftIconName, or rightButton with rightIconName
antiPatterns.missingRequiredProps: Always provide altText and ariaRole when using icons
antiPatterns.poorAltText: Avoid generic alt text like 'icon' or 'button' - be descriptive
antiPatterns.inconsistentHierarchy: Don't use subtitle without title or title-content
antiPatterns.wrongHeaderType: Don't use condensed headers when content isn't immediately following

props.name: iconName
props.description:
Interface for nck-icon component props
 * Universal icon component that loads and displays SVG icons from the Neo Icon Kit
 *
 * @aiUsage Core visual component used throughout all interfaces - handles icon loading, sizing, and accessibility
 * @aiCategory layout
 * @aiComplexity simple
 */
export interface INckIcon {
  /**
   * Icon name from Neo Icon Kit (833 available icons)
   * Must match exact SVG filename without extension
   *

props.name: iconAltText
props.description:
Icon display size - controls both width and height
   * - XXS: 0.5rem (8px) - Inline text icons
   * - XS: 1rem (16px) - Small buttons, form controls
   * - S: 1.25rem (20px) - Standard buttons, navigation
   * - M: 1.5rem (24px) - Larger buttons, headers
   * - L: 2rem (32px) - Feature icons, emphasis
   * - XL: 3rem (48px) - Hero icons, illustrations
   * @aiRequired true
   * @aiSuggestions {
   *   "button": "S",
   *   "form": "XS",
   *   "header": "M",
   *   "feature": "L",
   *   "hero": "XL",
   *   "inline": "XXS"
   * }
   */
  iconSize: IconSize;

  /**
   * Accessible alternative text for screen readers
   * - Use descriptive text when icon conveys important information
   * - Use empty string "" when icon is purely decorative
   * - Use action text for functional icons ("Save", "Delete", "Close")
   *

props.name: functional
props.type: ``, /** * Decorative icon without alt text * @aiContext Visual enhancement, non-essential decoration */ decorative: ``, /** * Status indicator icon with semantic coloring * @aiContext Status displays, state indicators */ status: ``, /** * Large feature icon for emphasis * @aiContext Hero sections, feature highlights, empty states */ feature: ``, /** * Navigation icon with directional meaning * @aiContext Navigation controls, arrows, directional actions */ navigation: ``, /** * Multi-color icon with primary and secondary fills * @aiContext Rich icons with backgrounds, badges, complex graphics */ multiColor: ``, /** * Currency icon for financial content * @aiContext Payment interfaces, pricing, financial data */ currency: ``, /** * Inline icon sized for text content * @aiContext Inline with text, small indicators, list bullets */ inline: ` Available features `, /** * Loading state icon * @aiContext Async operations, processing states */ loading: `` } as const
props.description:
Primary fill color override using design system colors
   * Automatically calculated based on context if not provided
   * @default Inherited from design system context
   * @aiSuggestions {
   *   "success": "green-300",
   *   "error": "red-300",
   *   "warning": "orange-300",
   *   "info": "bright-blue-300",
   *   "neutral": "blue-grey-500",
   *   "brand": "bright-blue-300"
   * }
   */
  primaryColor?: IconColors;

  /**
   * Secondary fill color for icons with multiple color elements
   * Only used by icons that have secondary fill areas (badges, backgrounds)
   *

antiPatterns.missingAltText: Don't leave iconAltText undefined - always provide string (even empty)
antiPatterns.wrongSizes: Don't use XL icons in buttons or XXS icons for primary actions
antiPatterns.colorMismatch: Don't use red colors for positive actions or green for errors
antiPatterns.overuseSecondaryColor: Don't use secondaryColor unless icon actually has secondary elements
antiPatterns.inconsistentSizing: Don't mix different icon sizes for same functional context

    :totalNumberOfItems="50000"

props.name: totalNumberOfItems
props.description:
Interface for nck-pagination component props
 * Navigation component for large datasets with page-based browsing and items-per-page control
 *
 * @aiUsage Essential component for data tables and large lists - handles pagination logic and accessibility
 * @aiCategory navigation
 * @aiComplexity complex
 */
export interface INckPagination {
  /**
   * Total count of items across all pages
   * Must be a positive integer representing the complete dataset size
   *

props.name: numberOfItemsPerPage
props.description:
Number of items to display on each page
   * Must be a positive integer that divides the total items into pages
   *

props.name: variables
props.type:
{min}, {max}, {total}
   * Uses translateAndFormat function for internationalization
   * @example "Showing {min}-{max} of {total} items", "Items {min} to {max} of {total}"
   * @aiRequired true
   * @aiUsage Provide clear context about current page range and total count
   */
  footerWording: string
props.description:
Current active page number (1-based indexing)
   * Must be between 1 and total number of pages
   *

props.name: pageNumberWording
props.description:
Page number aria-label template for accessibility
   * Supports template variables: {pageNumber}
   * Uses translateAndFormat function for screen reader announcements
   *

props.name: basic
props.type:
``, /** * Pagination with dynamic page size - user-controlled page size * @aiContext Large datasets, user preference interfaces, admin tables */ withPageSize: ``, /** * Table pagination integration - with data loading * @aiContext Data tables, management interfaces, filtered results */ tableIntegration: `
`, /** * Search results pagination - with result context * @aiContext Search interfaces, filtering systems, product catalogs */ searchResults: `
`, /** * Small dataset pagination - minimal configuration * @aiContext Small lists, simple browsing, focused content */ small: ``, /** * Large dataset pagination - with progressive page sizes * @aiContext Analytics interfaces, big data browsing, enterprise tables */ largeDataset: ``, /** * Mobile-optimized pagination - responsive design * @aiContext Mobile interfaces, responsive tables, touch-friendly navigation */ mobileOptimized: `` } as const
props.description:
Available page size options for items-per-page dropdown
   * When provided, adds dropdown for dynamic page size changes
   *

antiPatterns.inconsistentPageSizes: Don't offer page sizes that don't make sense for your content type
antiPatterns.poorWording: Avoid technical jargon in footerWording and pageNumberWording
antiPatterns.noFocusManagement: Don't ignore focus management after page changes
antiPatterns.invalidStates: Always validate currentPage is within valid range
antiPatterns.missingLoadingStates: Don't forget loading indicators during page transitions

props.name: heading
props.description:
Interface for nck-tabs component props
 * Comprehensive tabs component for organizing content into sections with navigation
 *
 * @aiUsage Primary component for content organization - supports overflow handling, icons, and counters
 * @aiCategory navigation
 * @aiComplexity medium
 */
export interface INckTabs {
  /**
   * Visual style of the tabs component
   * - UniformFull: Equal width tabs across full container (max 4 tabs recommended)
   * - Compact: Content-based width tabs with overflow menu handling
   * - CompactSide: Compact tabs with side alignment and overflow menu
   * @aiRequired true
   * @aiSuggestions { "main-navigation": "UniformFull", "content-sections": "Compact", "sidebar-tabs": "CompactSide" }
   */
  type: TabsType;

  /**
   * Makes tab content scrollable within its container
   * Use when tabs take most of the page height and you want sticky tab headers
   * @default false
   * @aiUsage Enable for full-page tab layouts, dashboard sections
   */
  scrollableContent?: boolean;

  /**
   * Hides the bottom border divider line under tabs
   * Use for custom styling or when tabs are in containers with borders
   * @default false
   * @aiUsage Use for cleaner look in cards or custom layouts
   */
  hideDivider?: boolean;

  /**
   * Index of tab to select initially (0-based)
   * Updates selected tab when value changes
   * Note: This is one-way binding - doesn't update with user selection
   *

antiPatterns.tooManyUniformTabs: Don't use >4 tabs with UniformFull type (mobile overflow)
antiPatterns.inconsistentContent: Don't mix unrelated content types within single tab
antiPatterns.missingHeadings: Don't forget descriptive tab headings - required for accessibility
antiPatterns.overuseCounters: Don't use trailingCounterValue for non-count information
antiPatterns.nestedTabs: Avoid nesting tabs within tabs - creates confusing navigation

components.name: nck-modal
components.description: Interface for nck-modal component props Modal dialog component with focus trapping, accessibility, and confirmation workflows
components.usage: Essential component for overlays, confirmations, and complex interactions

examples.name: confirmation
examples.context: Delete confirmations, destructive actions, irreversible operations

examples.name: form
examples.code:
<nck-modal
    modalTitle="Add New User"
    :size="ModalSize.S"
    :confirmDismissal="hasUnsavedChanges"
    v-model:displayed="showUserForm">

    <template #modal-body>
      <nck-form @submit="handleSubmit">
        <nck-text-input
          name="name"
          label="Full Name"
          v-model="userData.name"
          required />
        <nck-text-input
          name="email"
          label="Email Address"
          type="email"
          v-model="userData.email"
          required />
      </nck-form>
    </template>

    <template #modal-footer-action-buttons>
      <nck-button
        label="Cancel"
        type="outline"
        @click="handleCancel" />
      <nck-button
        label="Create User"
        type="filled"
        :loading="isCreating"
        loadingText="Creating user..."
        @click="handleSubmit" />
    </template>
  </nck-modal>
examples.context: User creation, edit profiles, settings forms

props.name: modalTitle
props.description:
Interface for nck-modal component props
 * Modal dialog component with focus trapping, accessibility, and confirmation workflows
 *
 * @aiUsage Essential component for overlays, confirmations, and complex interactions
 * @aiCategory overlay
 * @aiComplexity complex
 */
export interface INckModalProps {
  /**
   * Modal dialog title displayed in header
   * Used for screen reader navigation and modal identification
   *

props.name: closeModal
props.description:
Modal size variant - controls width and layout behavior
   * - XS: 320px - Minimal confirmations, simple alerts
   * - S: 600px - Standard forms, simple content
   * - M: 778px - Complex forms, moderate content (default)
   * - L: 980px - Data tables, extensive content
   * - FULL: Full screen - Complex applications, detailed workflows
   * @default ModalSize.M
   * @aiSuggestions {
   *   "confirmation": "XS",
   *   "form": "S",
   *   "content": "M",
   *   "data-table": "L",
   *   "full-app": "FULL"
   * }
   */
  size?: ModalSize;

  /**
   * ARIA role defining modal's semantic purpose
   * - DIALOG: Standard modal for forms, content, interactions
   * - ALERT_DIALOG: Critical confirmations, destructive actions, alerts
   * @default ModalRole.DIALOG
   * @aiRequired When modal contains critical/destructive actions
   * @aiSuggestions { "form": "DIALOG", "confirmation": "ALERT_DIALOG", "delete": "ALERT_DIALOG" }
   */
  role?: ModalRole;

  /**
   * Enables dismissal via close button, overlay click, or escape key
   * When false, modal can only be closed via explicit action buttons
   * @default true
   * @aiUsage Disable for critical workflows that must be completed
   */
  dismissable?: boolean;

  /**
   * Requires confirmation before dismissing modal
   * Shows confirmation dialog when user attempts to close
   * @default false
   * @aiUsage Enable for forms with unsaved changes or important workflows
   */
  confirmDismissal?: boolean;

  /**
   * Removes default padding from modal body content
   * Use for full-width content, tables, or custom layouts
   * @default false
   * @aiUsage Enable when body content needs full control over spacing
   */
  noBodyPadding?: boolean;

  /**
   * Icon name for optional header action button
   * Displays on left side of header for contextual actions
   *

antiPatterns.nestedModals: Avoid opening modals from within modals - use navigation or drawer patterns
antiPatterns.oversizedContent: Don't force large content into small modals - choose appropriate size
antiPatterns.missingActions: Always provide clear ways to complete or cancel modal interactions
